examples: Parents must make use of their natural ability to empathize.
I clearly empathize with the people who live in those neighbourhoods.
To Americans, polite conversationalists empathize by displaying expressions of excitement or disgust, shock or sadness.
As such, they play a key role in our ability to socialize and empathize with others.
Lori was unpopular with many, but you could at least empathize with her predicament.
